例如：开放到正式发布，补齐首期活动位和新手奖励。: Example: Open to formal release, complete first-wave campaign slots and onboarding rewards.

当前草稿和所选修订的差异会列在下面，确认后可以直接把目录草稿恢复到这个快照。: Differences between the current draft and the selected revision are listed below. Confirm to roll the catalog draft back to this snapshot.

记录每次创建、编辑、投稿入库、恢复和正式发布的快照。: Records snapshots from create, edit, submission ingest, restore, and formal publish events.
这里管理每个游戏的版本历史、发布摘要和最近一次正式发布状态。更新目录资料后会形成: Manage each game's revision history, publish summaries, and latest formal release status here. Editing catalog data creates a new draft revision; clicking publish formalizes a version.
选中目录中的具体游戏后，这里会显示版本历史、修订轨迹和发布操作。: Once a specific game is selected from the catalog, the revision history, change trail, and publish actions will appear here.
